items.title: Man arrested after surfing naked on top of moving locomotive
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Ferry carrying 116 passengers sinks off Guyana coast, authorities say
items.dek: Eight passengers have so far been rescued after the vessel capsized between Georgetown and Port Kaituma.
items.body: Eight passengers have so far been rescued after the vessel capsized between Georgetown and Port Kaituma.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Russia launches major ballistic missile attack on Kyiv
items.dek: One death is reported in what President Zelensky calls "one of the most massive ballistic attacks" on Ukraine's capital.
items.body: One death is reported in what President Zelensky calls "one of the most massive ballistic attacks" on Ukraine's capital.
